title: ixora arenosa
intro: Ixora arenosa, also known as the yellow ixora or yellow jungle geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ixora arenosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Ixora arenosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves are also used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
